name: docomator
description: Offline-first AI-assisted document automation platform for DOCX and XLSX.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @docomator/contracts && npm run build -w @docomator/config && npm run build -w @docomator/storage && npm run build -w @docomator/api && npm run build -w @docomator/worker
scripts.test: npm run test -w @docomator/contracts && npm run test -w @docomator/config && npm run test -w @docomator/storage && npm run test -w @docomator/api && npm run test -w @docomator/worker && node --test scripts/runtime/*.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test && npm run check:docs && npm run check:shell
